title: Golden Crunchy Portuguese Pepper Skewers
description: A cultured and crunchy Portuguese dish featuring mixed peppers and ferment kimchi, perfect for a snack or light meal, wrapped in a banana leaf for added flavor and tradition.
instructions: Cut the mixed bell peppers into 1 inch pieces and place them in a bowl.
Add the cut onion, fermented kimchi, olive oil, garlic, salt, and black pepper to the bowl and mix well.
Thread the pepper mixture onto skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Wrap each skewer in a banana leaf, securing with a toothpick if needed.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 20 minutes.
Flip the skewers over and bake for an additional 10 minutes, until the peppers are tender and lightly browned.
Remove the skewers from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes before serving.
